issues.description: Action type 'AttachDon' is incorrect. Card text says 'Give up to 1 rested DON!! card' which means transferring a rested DON from this card to opponent's Leader or Character. This should use 'GiveDon' with a condition checking for rested DON availability, or a custom transfer mechanic. 'AttachDon' adds DON to this card, not transfers rested DON away.

Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacterOrLeader' is correct for destination, but the action fundamentally misrepresents the mechanic—it should reflect giving away (removing) a rested DON from this card first.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[When Attacking] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to its owner's Leader or 1 of their Characters.
[On K.O.] Draw 1 card.
